proposal1.heroHeadline: Solstice is losing $100,000 annually on proposal inefficiencies. Here's the breakdown.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, crafting a proposal for your services takes hours. With our system, it's done in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Solstice is experiencing ongoing financial losses due to inefficiencies in proposal generation.

problems.title: Time-Consuming Proposals
problems.description: Each proposal takes 3 hours to create, costing Solstice $150 per proposal in labor. Over a year, this adds up to thousands lost.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Spending hours on proposals means less time to engage new leads. Solstice loses potential deals worth $20,000 every month.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manual proposals lead to branding inconsistencies, weakening Solstice's market position. This inconsistency costs an estimated $10,000 annually in lost brand equity.

problems.title: Delayed Responses
problems.description: Slow proposal turnaround results in delayed client responses, risking deals worth $5,000 every week.

problems.title: Excessive Revisions
problems.description: Frequent manual errors require costly revisions, wasting $8,000 annually in employee time.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Relying on multiple team members to draft proposals increases labor costs by $30,000 each year.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces all these inefficiencies with a seamless, automated solution.

solutions.title: Rapid Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, creating a proposal takes hours. Our system delivers a complete proposal in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual processes lead to branding inconsistencies. Our AI ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with Solstice's brand.

solutions.title: Enhanced Client Engagement
solutions.description: Delays in proposal delivery hinder client engagement. Our system provides instant proposals, keeping clients engaged and interested.

solutions.title: Error-Free Proposals
solutions.description: Manual errors lead to costly revisions. Our AI generates proposals with zero errors, saving time and money.

solutions.title: Cost-Effective Operations
solutions.description: High labor costs are a burden. Our system reduces the need for multiple team members, cutting costs significantly.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Solstice's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Solstice around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Solstice.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Empowering Acme Corp with Innovative Solutions for Enhanced Performance.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Transform Acme Corp's digital presence with Solstice's tailored strategies to drive growth and efficiency.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently facing significant revenue losses due to inefficiencies.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves without converting is revenue walking out the door. This could amount to thousands in lost sales monthly.

problems.title: Inefficient Operations
problems.description: Operational inefficiencies are costing Acme Corp time and resources. This results in delayed project timelines and missed opportunities.

problems.title: Weak Brand Presence
problems.description: A lack of strong brand presence in the market leads to missed connections with potential clients, affecting long-term growth.

problems.title: Poor Customer Engagement
problems.description: Without effective engagement strategies, retention rates drop, leading to a potential 20% loss in repeat business annually.

problems.title: Outdated Technology
problems.description: Relying on outdated systems increases operational costs and limits scalability, reducing competitive edge.

problems.title: Limited Market Insights
problems.description: Without accurate market data, strategic decisions are compromised, risking a 15% decline in growth opportunities.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Solstice's solutions directly address these critical issues, ensuring Acme Corp's success.

solutions.title: Digital Transformation
solutions.description: Streamline operations and improve efficiency by modernizing your technological infrastructure.

solutions.title: Brand Strategy
solutions.description: Enhance market presence with a strong brand strategy that resonates with your target audience.

solutions.title: Data Analytics
solutions.description: Leverage data insights to make informed decisions that drive growth and reduce uncertainty.

solutions.title: Customer Engagement
solutions.description: Implement engagement strategies that boost retention and customer satisfaction.
